title: Hamiltonian-Driven Shadow Tomography
summary: Realizing local randomized measurements from stochastic global drives, without gate-based random circuits, for analog quantum simulators.

title: Calibrating Cold-Atom Lattice Simulators
summary: Estimating site-dependent applied potentials from quantum-gas-microscope measurements following quantum quenches, using Hamiltonian-learning tools.

title: Dual Unitary Quantum Circuits
summary: Hierarchical generalizations of dual unitary circuits and stabilizer-based solvability conditions, developed during a visiting stay at the University of Cambridge.
image_alt: Illustration of dual unitary quantum circuits

title: Stabilizing Quantum Simulators of Gauge Theories
summary: Linear gauge protection against 1/f-beta noise sources in quantum simulators of lattice gauge theories, from my master's thesis work.
image_alt: Illustration of gauge theory noise protection
